title: Magworm
description: a difficult but simple boss, also yet another A.B.E. pack
body:
_003 - Nicknamed the Magworm, a powerful entity that is agressive, responds to the call of the Magmatic Artifact. VERY DANGEROUS, High Tier Weapons reccomended. From testing it takes a set amount of damage from all sources, piercing crossbow or other multi-target weapons are very effective_

This is my first boss ever! The Magworm is a test of a boss, its a very strong worm made of magma cubes that has no real purpose as of right now. Magworm comes with one unique trait, all damage to Magworm results in a set value, making them challangeable at any point in the game.
